welcomeTitle: A structured control room for AqarInn operations.
welcomeDescription: This starter keeps auth, permissions, APIs, and localization organized before business modules arrive.

foundationCardOne.title: Permissions-first
foundationCardOne.description: Route, section, tab, and action access are prepared from day one.

foundationCardTwo.title: Localization-first
foundationCardTwo.description: Arabic and English with RTL and LTR support are already wired.

loginDescription: Placeholder authentication for local foundation work. Replace with API calls later.
demoSignInHint: This login form stores a demo session locally so routing and permissions can be verified.
forgotPasswordDescription: The reset request UI will be implemented when authentication flows move beyond foundation mode.
resetPasswordDescription: Password update logic and API integration will be added later.
